description.value:
Prerequisite: Base attack bonus 6, Defensive Martial Arts.

Benefit: During the character's action, the character designates an opponent no more than one size category larger or smaller than the character. That opponent doesn't get to add his or her Strength modifier to attack rolls when targeting the character. The character can select a new opponent on any action.
description.summary: During the character's action, the character designates an opponent no more than one size category larger or smaller…
